Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Whoa... It's just as crazy on the inside.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}This is only the entrance. The labyrinth lies beyond the doorway at the top of these stairs.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}First, you need to get a feel for the place.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Why don't the three of you go have a look around?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}We're not asking you to go very far.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I'll help you navigate by feeding you information from here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}We'll also need to appoint a leader to make any necessary decisions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Like... the captain of a pirate ship!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}W-Wait! Why him!? He doesn't look like a captain![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Calm down. He has experience fighting already.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}That's true too, but the main reason is far more simple.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Can either of you summon your Persona without difficulty, like he can?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}These are Shadows we're talking about. Without your Persona, you're screwed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}All right, let's head inside. Are you ready, Leader?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}It all feels so sudden, doesn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}But hey, I'll be right there with you. C'mon, let's go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The {f 4 4 0 37 1 20481} in my hand is shining...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A strange door is sitting in[n]the corner of the lobby...[n]{f 1 1}
